calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Application And Application For Court Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Charles J. Antonen, Deputy Attorney General appearing for Plaintiff, TOBY DOUGLAS, DIRECTOR OF DHCS.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) KENNETH MEDINA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $46,139.67
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7,526.91
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $101.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $53,767.58
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Mar-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
